Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENERGY AND TELECOMMUNICATIONS

Title: Relates to requiring emergency notices be provided to customers in certain languages
Summary: Requires every utility corporation or municipality who sends an emergency notice to customers to make available and provide such notice in English, Spanish, Haitian-Creole, Mandarin, Cantonese, Arabic, French, Urdu, Russian, Yiddish, Korean, Bangla, Polish, Italian, Hindi and Tagalog.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to requiring emergency notices be provided to customers in certain languages
